title: Tabbed repository sections
summary: Repository page sections now switch as real tabs instead of rendering all sections on one page, and the README uses the shared markdown renderer in a height-limited scroll area.
userVisibleChange: Repository pages now keep Overview, Snapshots, Activity, Artifacts, and Settings in separate tabs; the README panel is scrollable and rendered by the markdown viewer.

risks.title: Tab state is local to the page
risks.mitigation: Verified tab switching with Playwright snapshots and screenshots; a future route-backed tab state can be added if deep links become necessary.

timeline.title: Converted repository sections to tabs
timeline.summary: Replaced anchor links and stacked panels with a stateful tablist and per-tab panels.

timeline.title: Bounded README markdown rendering
timeline.summary: Updated the shared markdown renderer to support a bare surface and used it in a capped scroll area for README content.

timeline.title: Ran automated and browser checks
timeline.summary: Verified with go test ./..., npm run build, and Playwright tab switching plus desktop/mobile screenshots.

decisions.title: Use local tab state
decisions.rationale: The request was for page-level tabs, and local state avoids additional routing while preserving fast switching.

decisions.title: Keep repository facts visible where useful
decisions.rationale: Overview and settings retain repository facts, while snapshots/activity/artifacts focus on their own content.

validation.output: tsc --noEmit and vite build completed successfully
Verified Overview, Snapshots, and Artifacts tabs; captured desktop and mobile screenshots.
